channel.title: Hardware on Vectors & Verbs
channel.description: Recent content in Hardware on Vectors & Verbs

item.title: The Architecture of Precision: Variations in model quantizations
item.description: Summary of how quantization bridges the gap between trillion-parameter models and the hardware they run on, and why ‘smaller’ is almost always ‘faster’.

item.title: Mission Impossible: Fitting Trillion-Parameter Giants into 80GB GPUs
item.description: An introduction to optimizations for Large Language Models, covering GPU utilization, precision control, and memory management.
